name: RipperMercs/tensorfeed-x402-base-mcp
description: Read-only Base mainnet chain reader for x402 payment verification. 11 tools: verify on-chain that a USDC settlement matches a claimed x402 receipt (recipient + amount), parse publisher `/.well-known/x402` manifests, list recent USDC payments to an address, check AFTA federation status, plus generic Base reads (balance, usdc_balance, get_tx_receipt, call, recent_transfers). No private keys, no signing, no broadcasts. MIT, published with cryptographic provenance via OIDC. Install: `npx -y @tensorfeed/x402-base-mcp`.
